samples.question: In what year was Nvidia founded?
Who is the co-founder and CEO of Nvidia?
samples.ground_truth: Jensen Huang is the co-founder, president, and CEO of Nvidia.

samples.question: What type of products is Nvidia best known for designing?
samples.ground_truth: Nvidia is best known for designing graphics processing units (GPUs), as well as system-on-chip units and AI hardware and software.
